## Describe Your Changes

Please describe the changes you made in this Pull Request and why they were necessary.

## Checklist before requesting a review

- [ ] My branch follows the branch naming convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, etc.).
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](file:///d:/MycoderCorps/CONTRIBUTING.md) file.
- [ ] I have verified that all frontend builds and lints pass (`npm run lint` and `npm run build`).
- [ ] I have verified that all backend tests pass (`pytest`).
- [ ] I have added/updated relevant unit/integration tests.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / manifest if changing assets or APIs.

## Screenshots / Video Recordings

If this PR contains UI/UX updates, please include screenshots or screen recordings showing the changes.
